error.host_required: Host/IP is required for this transport
error.serial_required: Please pick or enter a serial port
error.agent_device_id_required: Provider device ID is required for the local agent

user.title: Add DESS Monitor Local
user.description: Give this hub a friendly name. You will pick the inverter protocol, transport, and address on the next steps.

protocol.title: Choose protocol
protocol.description: Pick the command/data protocol spoken by the inverter or local data source.

transport.title: Choose transport
transport.description: Protocol: {protocol}. Pick how Home Assistant reaches it.

connection.title: Connection settings
connection.description: Protocol: {protocol}. Transport: {transport}. Enter the connection address and how often Home Assistant should poll the device.

data_description.host: Hostname or IP address of the inverter, gateway, agent, or local bind interface for EyBond.
data_description.port: TCP port. Defaults: 8899 for direct TCP/Modbus/EyBond, 8787 for the local agent.
data_description.serial_device: USB / RS232 device path. You can also type a path manually.
data_description.agent_device_id: providerDeviceId of the inverter exposed by solar-system-agent.
data_description.eybond_devaddr: RS485 slave address behind the EyBond dongle.
data_description.eybond_broadcast: UDP broadcast target used to announce the local server to the dongle.
data_description.eybond_announce_ip: Optional IP address advertised to the dongle. Leave empty for auto-detect.
data_description.update_interval: How often to poll the device. Lower values mean more frequent updates.
data_description.strict_crc: Drop Voltronic/PI18 frames with invalid CRC instead of trying to decode them.
